sections.content: Most coughs go away on their own within 3 weeks. Here is what you can do at home:
⚠️Important: See a GP if you have had a cough for more than 3 weeks.

sections.caption: A warm drink can soothe your throat

sections.content: There’s no cure for migraine. But there are remedies to help manage the pain.
⚠️ Important: See a GP if you have frequent or severe migraine symptoms.

sections.caption: A warm drink can help with migraines. Choose a variery that suit the type of migraines.

sections.title: Natural Remedies
items: limiting your intake of caffeine and alcohol

sections.content: Stomach ache and abdominal pain can have different causes. Here is what you can do at home:
⚠️ Important: See a GP if your stomach ache gets much worse quickly, you have problems with swallowing food or you’re losing weight without trying to.
Insomnia can be triggered by many factors. Here is what you can do at home:
⚠️ Important: See a GP if improving your sleep hygiene has not helped or poor sleep quality is affecting your daily life.

sections.caption: A warm chamomile tea can help help sleep. Drink before going to bed.

sections.title: Natural Remedies
items: Make sure your bedroom is dark and quiet
